findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "data_validate_json" references sensitive artifacts (password). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Use this when you need to validate JSON syntax or validate JSON data against a JSON Schema. Returns validity status, parse errors, formatted JSON, and structure…
